details.text: Member Name
Member Date of Birth
ID Proof Aadhar
Kindly confirm your full Name
Your Date of birth
Education Qualification
Your current Occupation
Please show your ID proof
Kindly share your current location( City and state with country)?
Sir/Mam' are you in agreement with the declaration that I have read out to you.
In the last 24 months, have you smoked or used any tobacco or nicotine products?
Do you consume alcohol ?
Have you ever been advised by a doctor to reduce or stop alcohol consumption ?
Have you ever used recreational drugs or Narcotics that was not prescribed by a Licensed physician ?
What is Proposed insured height (cm)?
What is Proposed Insured weight (kg)?

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: a. High/Low blood pressure, raised cholesterol or triglycerides or lipids

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: b. Chest pain or heaviness or discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, Heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, shortness of breath or any other heart conditions

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: c. Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sacroma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: d. Diabetes, raised blood sugar or sugar in urine,Hyperthyroidism, Hypothyroidism , other thyroid disorders, or any other endocrine disorders

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: e. Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease (COPD) or any other respiratory disorders

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: f. Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or any other diseases or disorders of the liver

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: g. Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus or any other diseases or disorders of the blood or autoimmune disease

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: h. Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limb, stroke, transient ischemic attack (TIA), multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, Dementia, Alzheimer's or any other neurological, nervous, mental health disorders?

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: i. Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcera-tive colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: j. Kidney stones, gall stones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hydrocele or any other disorders of the kidney, bladder, genital, prostate or urinary systems?

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: k. Recurrent Back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophies, deformity, physical disability or any other disorders of muscle, bones, joints, limbs or spine?

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: l. Blindness,cataracts, glaucoma, impaired sight, double vision or any other diseases or disorders of eyes

Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been / are currently under treatment for any of the following, if yes please provide details: m. Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficult in swal-lowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat

Is there anything else that you would like to share with us with respect to your health/ habits or anything else that you believe is important to ensure that policy is processed basis all facts & information?

Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years a)Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or pre-scribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endo-scopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test

Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years b) Medication or treatment that lasted more than 2 weeks or had been referred to a specialist doctor or hospital for any treatment/consultation and/or investigations (eg: Blood, ECG, MRI, Xray etc)

Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years c) Inability to perform your daily activities or absent from work more than two 2 consec-utive weeks at a time
Have you suffered from any congenital defect or disorder or hereditary disease such as cerebral palsy, Down's syndrome, poliomyelitis
Have you or your spouse or partner been told to undergo tests or treatment, or received any medical advice or counselling in connection with sexually transmitted diseases, including HIV and AIDS?

Apart from what you have disclosed, are you experiencing any unexplained weight loss/gain or any sign/symptoms that you are likely to seek medical advice or treatment for or awaiting any surgical procedure.
Are you Pregnant now?
Have you ever suffered/are currently suffering from gestational diabetes, preeclampsia or any other pregnancy related complications?

Have you ever suffered from or consulted a doctor for breast lump(s), breast disease, irregular or painful menstruation, abnormal Pap Smear or any other breasts or gynecological conditions such as vaginal disorders, or disorder of the uterus, ovary, fallopian tubes ?
